Verified from environment setup script scripts/install_adaudit_plus.ps1 which sets up the admin account.
Verified from environment setup script scripts/install_adaudit_plus.ps1 which explicitly changes the admin password to Admin@2024.

privileged_info_summary: The ADAudit Plus environment is configured with the administrator account 'admin' and password 'Admin@2024', set during installation. The task requires configuring LDAP attributes by adding 'department', 'title', and 'physicalDeliveryOfficeName', and setting the display name of 'physicalDeliveryOfficeName' to exactly 'Office Location'. These requirements are evaluated visually by the verifier.
